steps.title: Use the ear context
steps.content: The words are borne through an open window to Mr. Spring Fragrance's ears. In this context, receiving describes what ears do with sound.

steps.title: Compare the meanings
steps.content: Choice A, denying, contradicts perception; Choice B, entering, describes movement into a place; Choice C, carrying, describes transporting. Choice D, hearing, matches ears involuntarily perceiving words. The answer is D.
